answer:
**Viṣṇu Smṛti chapter 89** discusses the month of *Kārttika* (कार्तिक), assigning it to the deity Agni and outlining the spiritual merits of daily bathing, prayer recitation, and self-control during that month, which frees one from sins.[^1]

The chapter is brief (5 verses, ~98 words). It opens by naming the chapter and closes with the benefits of these rituals.[^2]

[^1]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, ch. 89, key passage [p-9b795e](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/89/translation/#p-9b795e).
[^2]: Viṣṇu Smṛti, ch. 89, opening [p-c3a34c](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/89/translation/#p-c3a34c) and closing [p-405f67](/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/89/translation/#p-405f67).
